decision_summary: Upstream evidence is too weak to justify handoff into Need Validation.
rationale: The current discovery artifacts surface the right question, but they do not yet support a handoff-ready need.
desirability_assessment: Potentially relevant, but not yet evidenced.
feasibility_assessment: Too early to judge delivery feasibility responsibly.
risk_assessment: Proceeding now would risk creating a project around an unvalidated problem.
recommended_next_step: Keep exploration open and gather external evidence before any handoff.
follow_up_questions: Which external evidence would make this problem handoff-ready?
